ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 22, 2023 is admitted to probate. Lucile Fett is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Continued To May-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
